  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    act()
    Act - do whatever the Ifv wants to do.
    void
    addedToWorld(greenfoot.World w)
    This method is called automatically when the Vehicle is added to the World, and places the Vehicle just off screen (centered 100 pixels beyond the center of the lane spawner) so it will appear to roll onto the screen smoothly.
    protected boolean
    checkHitPedestrian()

  • Method Details

    • addedToWorld

      public void addedToWorld(greenfoot.World w)
      Description copied from class: Vehicle
      This method is called automatically when the Vehicle is added to the World, and places the Vehicle just off screen (centered 100 pixels beyond the center of the lane spawner) so it will appear to roll onto the screen smoothly.
      Overrides:
      addedToWorld in class Vehicle

    • act

      public void act()
      Act - do whatever the Ifv wants to do. This method is called whenever the 'Act' or 'Run' button gets pressed in the environment.
      Overrides:
      act in class Vehicle

    • checkHitPedestrian

      protected boolean checkHitPedestrian()
      Specified by:
      checkHitPedestrian in class Vehicle
